changelog:
✨ **THE MODERN UPDATE** 🚀

• **All-New Home Screen**: Experience a premium aesthetic with Glassmorphism and Bento-style layouts.
• **Dynamic Backgrounds**: Added subtle, ambient gradients that match your theme.
• **Revamped Statistics**: Re-imagined the 'Music Journey' section as a high-end dashboard.
• **Polished UX**: Added smooth entrance animations and refined content carousels with multi-layered shadows.
